# Copilot Instructions

## Project Guidelines
- User prefers continuing refactors without running a build after each change unless explicitly requested.
- User prefers migrating inline styles to CSS classes during refactors, especially in slicer workspace components.
- User prefers not using passthrough wrapper components (e.g., PluginsPage wrappers) and instead importing/calling implementation components directly.
- User prefers all type definition files to be placed in a `types` folder and named accordingly.
